text: Proof: Consider any collection of subspaces of V. Note first that the intersection of the subspaces is nonempty, since it contains at least the zero vector from V. Now. let x. y be any two vectors in the intersection of all the subspaces in the collection (i.e.. x, y € W for all W in the collection). Since each W in the collection is a subspace of V, cx + y € W. Since this is true for all the W in the collection, cx + y is in the intersection of all the subspaces in the collection. Hence the intersection is a subspace of V by Theorem (1.2.8). M
